name: KOSS CORP
summary: Koss Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells stereo headphones and related accessory products. Founded in Delaware in 1971, the company sells through U.S. and international distributors, national retailers, grocery stores, electronics retailers, prisons, school systems, and directly to OEM manufacturers. Approximately 84% of fiscal year 2025 sales came from music-listening stereo headphones, with the remaining 16% from communications, education, metal detector, and OEM applications.

products.name: Stereo Headphones (Music)
products.description: Wired and Bluetooth stereo headphones for personal music listening, representing ~84% of fiscal 2025 sales.

products.name: Communication Headphones
products.description: Headphones used for telephone and internet communication purposes.

products.name: Education Headphones
products.description: Headphones sold to school systems and distributors for educational settings.

products.name: OEM Headphones
products.description: Headphones manufactured for inclusion with other manufacturers' products.

products.name: Metal Detector Headphones
products.description: Headphones designed for use in conjunction with metal detectors.

products.name: Bluetooth Headphones
products.description: Wireless Bluetooth headphones with ongoing R&D and new product introductions planned.

partnerships.description: Independent manufacturers in Asia produce complete stereo headphones to Koss specifications.
Contracted independent reps used as part of domestic and international distribution efforts.
Distributors in several foreign countries resell Koss products internationally.
